'''mawatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumobilia|pneumobilia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumobilia|pneumobilia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mawatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæwæthæth|mæwæthæth]] || [[word:mæwæthæj|mæwæthæj]] || [[word:mæwæthæsh|mæwæthæsh]] || [[word:mæwæthæ|mæwæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mawawathath|mawawathath]] || [[word:mawawathaj|mawawathaj]] || [[word:mawawathash|mawawathash]] || [[word:mawawatha|mawawatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mawathath|mawathath]] || [[word:mawathaj|mawathaj]] || [[word:mawathash|mawathash]] || [[word:mawatha|mawatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mawafthath|mawafthath]] || [[word:mawafthaj|mawafthaj]] || [[word:mawafthash|mawafthash]] || [[word:mawafthaf|mawafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mawathatha|mawathatha]] || [[word:mawathaja|mawathaja]] || [[word:mawathasha|mawathasha]] || [[word:mawathaka|mawathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mawathath|mawathath]] || [[word:mawathaj|mawathaj]] || [[word:mawathash|mawathash]] || [[word:mawatha|mawatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mawathathal|mawathathal]] || [[word:mawathajal|mawathajal]] || [[word:mawathashal|mawathashal]] || [[word:mawathakal|mawathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mawathathatha|mawathathatha]] || [[word:mawathajaja|mawathajaja]] || [[word:mawathashasha|mawathashasha]] || [[word:mawathaka|mawathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mawathathan|mawathathan]] || [[word:mawathajan|mawathajan]] || [[word:mawathashan|mawathashan]] || [[word:mawathakan|mawathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mawathathaoro|mawathathaoro]] || [[word:mawathajaoro|mawathajaoro]] || [[word:mawathashaoro|mawathashaoro]] || [[word:mawathakaoro|mawathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
